description: VTEC transition parameters for B18C LS VTEC builds

ls_vtec_na_93oct.notes: LS bottom end (B18B) with B16A VTEC head. Non-VTEC cam profile optimized for low-end torque, VTEC cam for top-end power.

ve_discontinuity.description: VE table jumps at VTEC crossover due to cam profile change. Must be smoothed.
ve_discontinuity.blend_strategy: Linear interpolation over 200 RPM window centered on engagement point

fuel_correction.description: Fuel enrichment during VTEC transition to prevent lean spike
fuel_correction.notes: Apply 3% fuel adder for 150ms during VTEC solenoid activation to compensate for sudden airflow increase

ignition_correction.description: Ignition retard during transition to prevent knock from sudden VE change
ignition_correction.notes: Pull 2 degrees during transition, taper back over 200ms

ls_vtec_turbo_93oct.notes: Under boost, engage VTEC earlier to maximize cam efficiency. Higher VE jump requires more aggressive fuel correction.

fuel_correction.notes: Turbo builds need more transient fuel at VTEC crossover due to higher airflow delta

ignition_correction.notes: More aggressive retard under boost during VTEC switch
